title: Loan Approval
description: Predicts whether a loan application will be approved or rejected based on applicant details using a machine learning model.

title: Smart Cart
description: Segments customers into distinct groups based on purchasing behavior to enable targeted marketing strategies.

title: Sentiment Analysis
description: Analyzes reviews to detect and classify the underlying sentiment as positive or negative using NLP.

title: Text Summary
description: Automatically condenses long articles or documents into short, meaningful summaries using AI.

title: AI Attendence
description: Marks student attendance automatically by recognizing faces in real-time using computer vision.

title: AI Gym
description: Tracks and counts workout reps in real-time by detecting body pose and movement through your webcam.

title: Snappy
description: Snappy is a real-time messaging application with emoji functionality and multiple avatar options.

title: Ecomzy
description: User-friendly interface for different devices, ensuring accessibility and usability for all users.
